project_type: Python MCP server for Instagram (76 tools), async, production-grade
build_system: setuptools via pyproject.toml. pip install -e '.[dev]' for dev setup
test_framework: pytest with pytest-asyncio (asyncio_mode=auto). Tests in tests/. conftest.py mocks mcp.server.fastmcp modules since curl_cffi may not be fully available. Tests ignore tests/test_upload.py, tests/test_new_tools.py, tests/test_final_push.py in CI.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network. Python 3.11 default. curl_cffi import is mocked in tests via conftest.py.
contribution_requirements: Keep backwards compat for all imports. Existing tests must pass. Follow existing code style (docstrings, type hints, logging patterns). tools/__init__.py CANONICAL_ORDER and _REGISTRARS must be updated if new toolsets added.
key_patterns: Each toolset in tools/ has a register_<name>(mcp, client, config, exporter) -> list[ToolDescriptor] function. Tools use @mcp.tool decorator inside the register function closure. _helpers.py has sanitize_username, _tool_error, _exception_to_tool_error, ToolDescriptor, AuthTier. Client uses proxy retry pattern with _with_proxy_retry. Monitor uses fetch_fn callback pattern. Exporter uses JsonExporter with save() method.
directory_structure: instagram_mcp/ - main package. instagram_mcp/tools/ - per-domain tool registrars. tests/ - pytest tests. scripts/ - utility scripts. .github/workflows/ - CI.
